backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the Arena backend with user profiles, content metadata, likes, comments, playback queues, follow relationships, and a messaging system, all protected by access control.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Arena app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Feed, Upload, ContentDetail, UserProfile, Mind, and Messages pages, and conditionally shows a ProfileSetupModal for new users.
Comments section component that fetches, displays, and allows adding or deleting comments on content, with per-comment author profile lookup and owner-only delete with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationDial: Reusable alert dialog component for confirming destructive or non-destructive actions, supporting custom labels, a pending/loading state, and optional destructive styling.
frontend/src/components/ContentCard.tsx: Content card component that displays media metadata with MIME-type-derived badges, thumbnail fallback, like/queue/comment actions, and owner-only delete with confirmation, navigating to detail or profile pages on click.
frontend/src/components/ConversationView: Renders a full conversation thread between the current user and a partner, displaying message bubbles with avatars, timestamps, and read receipts, and provides a text input to send new messages.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileDialo: A modal dialog that allows the authenticated user to edit their display name, bio, and profile picture, with image preview, removal, and size validation before submitting changes.
A drag-and-drop / click-to-browse file input component that accepts any file type, displays the selected file's name and size with a category-appropriate icon, and supports clearing the selection.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The top-level page shell that renders the sticky header with logo, navigation links (including an unread-message badge), login/profile controls, and a slide-out playback queue panel.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MediaPlayer.tsx: A media player component with play/pause, seek, volume, mute, repeat, skip ±15 s, and prev/next track controls, rendering either a video element or an audio element with a thumbnail based on the track's MIME type.
frontend/src/components/ProfileMenu.tsx: Dropdown menu component for the logged-in user showing avatar, display name, and options to edit profile, delete account, or log out. Handles profile picture blob URL creation/revocation and delegates mutations to React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/QueuePanel.tsx: Slide-in side panel that displays the playback queue with controls to remove, reorder, clear items, or navigate to a content page. Uses React Query hooks for queue state and shows audio/video type badges.
frontend/src/components/ThumbnailCreator: Component for selecting a thumbnail for uploaded media, supporting either frame capture from a video (with a seek slider) or image file upload. Converts the chosen image to Uint8Array and passes it to the parent via a callback.
Displays a public user profile card with avatar, bio, follower/following counts, and follow/unfollow/message actions. Redirects to the messages page or back to the feed and uses React Query hooks for profile and follow state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, keyed by the current identity principal. Invalidates and refetches all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, logout, identity, status) via a React context and AuthClient, with idle handling disabled by default. Exports the provider component and a useInternetIdentity hook for consuming the context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, content, comments, posts, messages, and conversations. Wraps actor calls with useQuery/useMutation and handles cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the Arena dark theme including neon glow utilities and color tokens for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ContentDetailPage.tsx: Page component for displaying a single media item with a player, like/queue controls, delete option for owners, and a collapsible comments section. Handles view increment on load and queue-based next-content navigation.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Main discovery page that lists all content with filtering by type (all/music/video), sorting by recent or popular, and a search input. Renders a hero banner and a responsive grid of ContentCards with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.tsx: Messaging page that shows a list of conversations with partner avatars, last message preview, and unread counts, alongside a ConversationView panel for the selected thread. Supports URL-based conversation selection and search filtering.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: A modal dialog for new users to set up their profile by entering a name, optional bio, and optional profile picture, then saving via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: A page that allows authenticated users to upload audio or video content with a title, description, thumbnail, and optional album cover, tracking upload progress and navigating home on success.
frontend/src/pages/UserProfilePage.tsx: A page that parses a principal string from the URL, validates it, and renders the `UserProfileView` component for the corresponding user.
frontend/src/pages/WhatsOnYourMindPage.t: A social feed page where authenticated users can create, like, and delete text/image posts and nested comments, with avatar display and relative timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL query parameters from both standard query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/videoFrameCapture.ts: A utility function that captures the current frame of an HTMLVideoElement as a PNG Blob using an off-screen canvas.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the Arena app's dark neon theme, custom color tokens, fonts, shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking pending feature requests for the Arena messaging app, specifically adding Enter-to-send keyboard behavior and a visible Send button to the ConversationView message input.
